title: awesome birch forests
description: it's awesome because it's a cooler green
body:
joined a server and decided to live in a birch forest, i kinda dislike the green so i decided to replicate the look of a pack i made when i was 12, uses my bushy leaves model and if you don't like it, you can remove it from the pack manually

yes everything being lowercase is intentional i made this pack in a few minutes

supports up to resource pack version 100 because i'm tired of my packs constantly becoming "outdated" because mojang added a single texture in a snapshot
